game.title: High Tide
game.short_text: Short action game made for the "My First Game Jam Summer '21"

details.title: High Tide
details.description:
Take to the seas in your vessel!Monsters are attacking!The world is mostly underwater!No time for questions!
Dive! Dive! Dive!
Content Warning: Middle school level swear words
PHONE/TABLET CONTROLS:Controls displayed on screen
KEYBOARD CONTROLS:Up - Up Arrow / W  Down - Down Arrow / S  Left - Left Arrow / A  Right - Right Arrow / D  A (Interact/Shoot) - Alt / Z / J  B (Cancel/Jump)  - Ctrl / K / X  Save Menu (Internal Submarine Level only) - Enter 
You can also download the ROM file to play either through a Game Boy emulator OR you can flash it onto a cartridge and play it on Game Boy hardware!
Made for the My First Game Jam Summer 2021 with GB Studio.
Credit to krümel (crumb)#0723 for "Supa-Hip Breakbeat" track.
All other art assets and music was created by me over the two weeks of the game jam.
Thank you for testing, Bryce Massé, Brett Barrow, Aaron Byrd, and Patty Templeton!

details.title: SpaceScape
details.description:
(Project with @securas)
SpaceScape is a hardcore roguelite platformer in which the player has to either escape the space prison or rise to the challenge and become the ruler of his cell block. 
Features:
. 2 enemies and 1 special BIG enemy.
. Upgrades and new weapons to help you on your quest for freedom. 
. Your name on the leaderboard with the best score of the room. 
. Fast pace action that requires a learning curve.  
After downloading the game, unpack the game and launch the .exe file.

game.title: Little Spy
game.short_text: Airdrop into an enemy stronghold, recover stolen intelligence and technology. Fight your way out.

details.title: Little Spy
details.description:
Available for Linux 🐧 Windows 🪟 macOS 🍏 Android 🤖 and Web 🕸 
Intended resolution 1920x1080HTML5 runs best at full screen using a Chromium based browser or Firefox, click the full-screen icon in the bottom right corner.Best played with a controller 🎮
Plot
Airdrop into an enemy stronghold, recover stolen intelligence and technology. Fight your way out!
Objective
Collect as much stolen intelligence and technology as you can and get to the extraction point before the helicopter leaves without you. Earn a higher agent ranking by collecting more items and complete the mission as fast as possible to earn a higher bonus.
Game Mechanics
Little Spy can run and jump. Holding jump extends the jump height.Little Spy is a climber. They can grab walls and slide down them, jump climb up them or wall jump away from them.Like all the best spies, Little Spy has a gadget; a parachute that can stow and deploy itself.Little Spy has a killer flying kick, which can be used to dash, attack enemies or double jump.Little Spy can use all of these skills in combination.
The enemies
Enemies can be stomped or kicked:
Guards (no helmet) require 1 hit to kill.Soldiers (helmets) require 2 hits to kill.
Enemies have teleport technology and new recruits will teleport into the game to replace their fallen comrades.
Controls
Little Spy should work with most game controllers. Game control instructions are presented on the main menu of the game.
A/D, Cursor Left/Right, D-pad or Left Stick to move.W, Cursor Up, A to jump.S, Cursor Down, Y to deploy/stow parachuteSpace or B to flying kick.
My First Game Jam: Summer 2021
Little Spy is my entry in the My First Game Jam: Summer 2021.
The theme for the jam was ✨Free✨. My interpretation of the theme is to create a game using only tools that are free software, free of cost, or game assets that are free or in the public domain.
In keeping with the Free theme, I have released the game project and code under an MIT license.
Little Spy Source Code
Dev Log


I've been wanting to learn Godot for a while now, so decided to use this jam as motivation. I haven't written a game since the 1980s, but I have a background in software development. My DevLog from the jam is below:
Little Spy - DevLog
Tools
I used these excellent tools to make Little Spy.
Godot EngineGIMPOcenaudioUbuntu MATE
Credits
Code & Game Design: Martin Wimpress (Wimpy)
A big "Thank you!" to everyone below who makes their art 🖌 music 🎶 or sounds 🔊 freely available for others to build on. Little Spy would have been shapes and silence had it not been for these fine people:
Graphics
Spy: DezrasDragons & GrafxKidGuard & Soldier Umz & GrafxKidMilitary items: AngryMeteor.comHelicopter: HoboBackgrounds: SegelTiles: RottingPixelsController & Keyboard: xelu
Audio
Sound effects: rubberduckIn-game music: artisticdudeGame over music: KistolMission Accomplished music: Jonathan Shaw

Fonts
Great Lakesi pixel u
I published a collection on OpenGameArt.org that includes everything I used from OGA:
https://opengameart.org/content/little-spy

game.title: walk with me.
game.short_text: conversations between a young god and a heart of stone.

details.title: walk with me.
details.description:
WALK WITH ME  — CONVERSATIONS BETWEEN A YOUNG GOD AND A HEART OF STONE.
amid the war of gods, a young god finds a friend in the mountains. snippets of conversation of a story that has already told / has yet to be finished. a brief game jam experiment on writing across both twine and trying out bitsy. 
story autosaves at specific checkpoints. played best on a computer browser, has not been optimised for mobile. has been updated to (hopefully) be compatible for mobile. estimated playing time ~25 minutes.
known issues: 
sometimes, after exiting a bitsy passage, you may need to click on the game area again to restore keyboard controls. if you tend to click to advance, then it should work fine.depending on your screen size, certain descriptions when accompanied by an image may run beyond the set height. the browser should scroll down automatically to the lowest section of text, but if not, try clicking and scrolling manually.contributions & submissions:a french translation by tinharts is available here!

game.title: Hyper Dungeon Crawler (MFGJ)
game.short_text: Made for My First Game Jam: Summer 2021.

details.title: Hyper Dungeon Crawler (MFGJ)
details.description:
Hyper Dungeon Crawler is a turn-based roguelike RPG with crafting. 
In this game, you'll challenge 2x3 levels occupied by dozens of enemies. Find and collect materials around. Craft, cook and brew supplements for your venture. You are free to explore, create, venture and do whatever you want with in-game environments. Be careful and enjoy.


Made for My First Game Jam: Summer 2021 (themed ✨Free✨). This is not my first released game, but it's my first submission ever to a game jam. I'll continue polishing the game and producing more contents if you like Hyper Dungeon Crawler.
Control: point and click
Note: the CRT effect and video options are for downloadable only
Post-jam udpate: full version available on Steam and Itch now.
Credits:
Created with Bitty EngineBountiful Bits, Bit Bonanza by VEXED (CC0)Caketown by Matthew Pablo (CC-BY-SA 3.0)

game.title: Feathers & Powers
game.short_text: A platformer where you have to save the birds !

details.title: Feathers & Powers
details.description:
A mysterious force has taken control of the forest ! Strange hazards have appeared and BIRDS have been trapped inside force fieldsYour goal is simple : FREE the birds and use their powers to help you find and destroy the source of this invasion.
This game was made by W00shy and To_Steal_Is_Bad for My First Game Jam Summer 2021 with the theme ✨Free✨. Controls :
WASD, ARROW KEYS + Space Bar to moveE or X to InteractM to MuteR to Restart the current level
You can play the game in your browser or download the executable file for Windows. We recommend using the executable file as the browser version might be slower and have a few audio issues.
Credits :

game.title: Freedom
game.short_text: My submission to the "My first game jam: Summer 2021" with the theme "Free"

details.title: Freedom
details.description:
Movement:  WASD, arrow keys and space
So I'm pretty new to game development and it's summer break at school, so I decided to join this game jam to release my first game. I wasn't really able to think of a good idea to go with the theme so I just made it so that you have to escape from a platformer level (lame). The game isn't that good, there are only four levels, it's a mess of code and there isn't that much to it so I'll probably keep updating it after the jam.
Engine: Godot
Art: Pixelorama
Sound: Chiptone
Music: https://opengameart.org/content/4-chiptunes-adventure

details.title: Forklift F2P
details.description:
"Uh, a new Free to Play game.
Let's install it and try it out! What could go wrong?"
- You

Forklift F2P aims to parody the "Free To Play"-Culture by revealing some threats of shady software. 
Prepare yourself for a short adventure with riddles, parodies and eastereggs.

Enjoy!

Contibutors:
 Luca 'eisclimber' DreilingArtur 'exor' Plischke'mrDock21'Miguel 'ツ coisalegalle' Araújo Nogueira

game.title: Where is James?
game.short_text: A small Level based Top down shoot #My First Game Jam: Summer 2021

details.title: Where is James?
details.description:
Where is James?
Or otherwise said: Where is your brother? I can tell you: He was caught by some pretty bad guys so let's save him.
You play as Jarles a stone-throwing adventurer. That fights with your help from room to room through the monsters that challenge him. 


The Controls are simple
W/A/S/D to run around 
Space to dash in the direction you are running
and where ever you click Jarles will throw a stone

Shopping
Everybody loves shopping and today is our lucky day everything is for FREE.

Tipps
Play in fullscreen (bottem right the Button from Unity)
Don't forget that you can Dash around it can help really. And don't forget to write a comment if you have feedback :)

Sound Update
a small but very important update The Sound Update
After I didn't had enought time to do sound design in the Game Jam time here it is. Please give every feedback and  suggestions for improvement about this theme. thank :)
